LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION OF PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Off Calendar Mar-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant San Francisco Unified School District's demurrer to the sixth cause of action of plaintiff's second amended complaint for intentional infliction of emotional distress is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to allege conduct that is extreme and outrageous.

Order signed. (See Word minutes or order signed this date for the Court's complete ruling.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported (302/EPS)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2019 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendant San Francisco Unified School District's demurrers to the first, second and third causes of action for race, age, and sex discrimination and the sixth cause of action for breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing are sustained without leave to amend.

(See word minutes for full details)

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare a proposed order repeating the Court's ruling verbatim in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
